name: swap-hub
author: swapHub
description: 3D Print Swap Queue Generator for Bambu Lab A1 Mini

scripts.electron:build: npm run electron:clean && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run electron:clean && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run electron:clean && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run electron:clean && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux
